svg.title: AI Test Generator Architecture
svg.desc: Complete CI/CD pipeline showing code flow from GitHub PR through test generation, execution, self-healing, and results reporting

g.text: Developer commits Python files → Workflow triggers
Extract changed files • Setup environment • Install dependencies
Aggregate results • Calculate metrics • Format JSON
Legend: Blue = I/O • Purple = Orchestration • Teal/Amber/Coral = Processing • Pink = Healing • Green = Aggregation
